title: Electric Shaver Shortlist in Germany
source_policy: Hybrid registry + deterministic source roles. Price and availability prefer idealo.de; manufacturer pages are used for specs; review sites are used only as performance proxies.

candidates.name: Remington X7 Limitless XR1775
candidates.ownership_note: Replacement interval is a conservative placeholder because Germany-specific replacement cadence was not verified.

sources.title: Idealo: Braun Series 9 Pro+ 9577cc offers
sources.notes: Search result showed offers from 285.95 EUR and delivery dates around 2026-07-09/10.

sources.title: Braun official Series 9 Pro+ page
sources.notes: Official page states 60 min Li-Ion runtime, wet/dry use, waterproofing, and 5-minute quick charge.

sources.title: Idealo: Braun Series 9 Pro+ 96M replacement head
sources.notes: Search result showed 46.78 EUR product price and 50.93 EUR including shipping.

sources.title: Idealo: Philips Shaver S9000 Prestige SP9840/32
sources.notes: Search result showed 8 offers from 310.00 EUR to 372.00 EUR.

sources.title: Philips official SP9840 technical specifications
sources.notes: Official specs state 60 min runtime, 1h full charge, 5 min quick charge, and SH91 replacement head.

sources.title: Philips SH91 replacement heads
sources.notes: Manufacturer page says replace heads within/two years to restore performance.

sources.title: Idealo: Panasonic ES-LV67
sources.notes: Search result showed 5 offers from 122.99 EUR, 315 product opinions, 5 blades, 200 g, 50 min runtime, 1h charging.

sources.title: Panasonic Store UK: ES-LV67
sources.notes: Manufacturer store states 5 blades, beard sensor, 3 min quick charge, 50 min cordless use, and WES9032Y accessory reference.

sources.title: ShaverCheck: Panasonic ES-LV67 review
sources.notes: Review summary describes very close, comfortable, fast/powerful shaves and suitability for coarse beards.

sources.title: Idealo: Braun Series 8 8567cc
sources.notes: Search result showed 6 offers from 193.99 EUR and 60 min runtime with cleaning station.

sources.title: Idealo: Braun Shaver Head 53B
sources.notes: Search result showed 46.98 EUR including shipping for original Braun 53B.

sources.title: Idealo: Philips Shaver Series 7000 S7886/35
sources.notes: Search result showed 115.99 EUR and notes 60 min runtime, 1h charge, 5 min quick charge.

sources.title: Idealo: Philips SteelPrecision SH71/50
sources.notes: Search result showed 31.74 EUR product price and 34.73 EUR including shipping.

sources.title: Philips SH71 replacement heads
sources.notes: Manufacturer page says change heads every 12 months and fits S7000.

sources.title: Idealo: Braun Series 7 71-S7200cc
sources.notes: Search result showed 19 offers from 135.99 EUR, 50 min runtime and 1h charging.

sources.title: Braun Series 7 official/brand page
sources.notes: Brand page confirms 50 min running time from 1h charge for Series 7.

sources.title: Idealo: Braun Series 7 Shaver Head 73S
sources.notes: Search result showed 11 offers from 40.99 EUR to 70.72 EUR.

sources.title: Idealo: Remington X7 Limitless XR1775
sources.notes: Search result showed 9 offers from 59.99 EUR to 88.42 EUR, 60 min runtime, 1.5h charging.

sources.title: Remington replacement parts
sources.notes: Used only as a parts availability reference; German replacement pricing for this model needs verification.

open_caveats: The current decision budget is a 200 EUR device-price ceiling. Three-year ownership cost is still shown, but it is not the purchase-price limit.
Performance metrics are proxy scores, not lab measurements. They combine blade/motor design, official features, review signals, and source confidence.

Three-year cost includes a rough replaceable-part allowance and estimated replacement cadence. Cleaning cartridge consumables are not priced because current Germany cartridge-use assumptions were not collected.
Retail prices are current source-observed values from search results on 2026-07-05 and should be refreshed before purchase.

domain_registry.notes: Used for current Germany-facing prices, offer counts, availability notes, and simple product specs.
Strong for battery/runtime/waterproof/manufacturer claims; not independent evidence.
Used for S9000/SH91/SH71 runtime and replacement interval claims.
Used for ES-LV67 specs and accessory price reference where German accessory pricing was weaker.
Used as a qualitative performance proxy only; not treated as lab data.
Used only where Germany replacement-head data is sparse.
